title: Looking to hire a Freelancer
excerpt: We are an educational agency and want to utilize Monday.com for our client onboarding/execution. We bring on 50+ clients per year with 100ish tasks detailed per client, completed by a team of 7-9 individuals at any given…

posts.author: gmacgil2 (Garret MacGillivray)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are an educational agency and want to utilize Monday.com for our client onboarding/execution. We bring on 50+ clients per year with 100ish tasks detailed per client, completed by a team of 7-9 individuals at any given time.

We are already using Monday.com in a basic form but want to make the boards more integrated and more user friendly so want to speak with a specialist to see what they can do.

Feel free to send me an e-mail at Garret@uniexplore.com to reach out.

posts.author: OliverChrome (Oliver Crombach)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Garret, will send you a mail!

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Gareth!

I will also send you an email with this info. I specialise in integrating Monday.com for my clients and making sure they get the most out of it!

One of the most common processes we automate and streamline is client onboarding whether it’s for 5 or 100 tasks. I would love to see how my team and I can help and if we would like to work together.

I offer a complimentary initial 1-hour appointment.

Look forward to hearing from you!
Elena K
Kick Consulting

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @gmacgil2 - and a warm welcome to the community! You have certainly come to the right place as there are many Monday.com experts to help you on your journey. We at Green Llamas would love to learn a little more about what your plans are.

I have sent you an email as requested, but also feel free to check us out online to find out a little more about what we do.

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

Take care and have a wonderful day!
Mark

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
@gmacgil2 - welcome to the community!! Perhaps you have already chosen one of the above users for your needs, but I will also reach out to see if you still need assistance enhancing your monday.com automations and workflows.
Let me know if you are interested in a free demo of some of our use-cases in Monday.com to see if it makes sense for us to work together. email: tim@timlittletech.com

I have helped clients in similar situation as yours to create visual customer workflows and then set up those customer workflows using automations, integrations and task assignments to streamline customer experience. I’d be happy to do a demo of our use-case to see if it would be a good fit for us to work together.

My latest client has around 15 stages in their workflow, and multiple boards with over 80 task assignments spread out between a team of 5 people. We have task creation automated, and include automated emails to customers throughout the workflow to keep them up to speed on progress.

here is a link to my site for more information on my overall services: https://timlittletech.com

Cheers!
